_note: Topic queries for the Google News long-tail lane (source='google_news' in news_items). Each entry becomes a Google News SEARCH RSS feed (https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=...&hl=tr&gl=TR&ceid=TR:tr). Items are kept only if banking-relevant (same keyword filter as press, src/news/sources/press.py) and their publisher host is NOT already a press feed (no duplicate outlets). The news.google.com redirect link is resolved to the real publisher URL via googlenewsdecoder, serially and only for new items. Hand-edited via PR, like press_feeds.json.
